blended.narrative: Fernie Alpine Resort is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,408 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 4" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
